content.en:
Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the White Ghost Extreme Venerable continued to kill, completely suppressing the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, and the Ultimate Arcane Tearing Heaven caused great damage to the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

Ye Tian used the ultimate arcane technique of tearing the sky again and again, and the White Ghost Extreme Venerable had no good way to resist it at all.

"Stop me, if I don't stop, I will urge this treasure to perish. The White Ghost Extreme Venerable threatened.

He clenched the beads left by Lei Yan Jizun in his hand and detonated them at any time.

"Then you detonate it!"

Ye Tian continued to attack.

He didn't care about the threat of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, it was a big deal that this replica body would be wiped out, and he was not afraid.

“......"

The white ghost was stunned, Ye Tian was not afraid of threats, what should I do?

Detonate?

What are you kidding, "two, three, three" he may fall!

If it hadn't been detonated, his hole cards for escape would have been exhausted long ago, and it was really possible to be killed by Ye Tian!

Another time passed.

The White Ghost Jizun was completely panicked, his injuries were not light, and if he continued to fight, he would really fall.

"Fight!"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable urged the bead in his hand and detonated the ultimate Extreme Venerable power from Lei Yan Extreme Venerable.

In a flash.

This area is covered by this ultimate force.

Ye Tian tried to dodge this power, but he couldn't, the surrounding void seemed to be solidified, and the endless ultimate power of thunder poured into his body, making his body annihilate little by little.

His defenses were like papier-mâché under such an attack, and it was impossible for him to survive such an attack without a perfect ultimate body.

And his attack power is terrifying, after all, there is an ultimate arcane to tear the sky, but this is the ultimate arcane of the attack class, not the ultimate arcane of the defense class.

Unless he comprehended the ultimate arcane of defense, it would be impossible for him to resist such an ultimate supreme power.

It was not only Ye Tian's copy body that was erased together, but also all the material in this vast territory, all of which turned into nothingness all around.

Soon.

The ultimate power dissipated, and a broken body crawled out, and it was the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

He's not dead!

"Hahaha, I still survived!"

The White Ghost Jizun said excitedly.

If he hadn't killed the other party, when the other party broke through to become an Eternal Ultimate Realm Master, maybe he would have died.

However, he was also seriously injured this time, and his injuries were very serious, and he had no strength to fight again.

He hurriedly shuttled, trying to get out of here.

However.

He hadn't traveled far before a figure stopped him, and it was Ye Tian who had just fought with him.

"You...... You're not dead?"

The White Ghost Supreme Zun couldn't believe it.

"No, you weren't the main body just now, you were a clone!" The White Ghost Jizun understood, but it wasn't like a clone at all, whose doppelganger was so powerful!

"Yes, guessed right, that's my doppelganger, you're very good, use that kind of treasure to kill me a clone, but unfortunately killing my doppelganger has no effect on me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Spare your life!"

The white ghost begged for mercy.

Now that he has no combat power, Ye Tian can kill him casually, and he doesn't have that kind of treasure, even if he has it, if he uses it, he will definitely die.

Rumble!

Ye Tian directly cast the Tearing Heaven, and a blow slammed into the body of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, obliterating it, and its remnants were absorbed by the Ultimate Land.

"I didn't expect an Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord to die at my hands!"

I think that at the beginning, he had only come to the Ultimate Land not long ago, and he had no power to resist in the hands of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

Of course, his current combat power is still not as good as the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, but the White Ghost Extreme Venerable was severely injured by other Eternal Grade Ultimate Realm Lords, which made him pick up the bargain and kill him.

After killing the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, Ye Tian quickly left.

Soon after, some Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords came.

"The aura of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable has dissipated!"

"There are traces of being absorbed by the Ultimate Land, it seems that the origin of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable has been absorbed by the Ultimate Land. "

"Looking at it this way, the White Ghost Jizun is dead!"

"Before, the Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable was scared away by the treasure of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, who killed the White Ghost Extreme Venerable?"

"From the current point of view, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable used that treasure and exploded with enough power to bombard the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord, but his enemy was not killed, and the White Ghost Extreme Venerable was killed, who can resist the power of that treasure?"

"Maybe it's the invincible existence of the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, otherwise I can't think of anyone who can survive such an attack.........."

"Hahaha, don't worry about who killed the White Ghost Jizun, anyway, the White Ghost Jizun was killed, which is also a good thing for us!"

"Let's go!"

These Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords left one by one.

......

After killing the White Ghost Jizun, Ye Tian was in a good mood.

In the years that followed, he silently practiced penance, and time passed like this.

It was another relatively long period of time, and during this period, several ancient level Ultimate Realm Masters fell, and even more Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters fell.

But the ultimate catastrophe seems to be over, and order has been restored in many places.

Ye Tian obviously felt that everything in the Ultimate Land was recovering, and it seemed that it was easier to comprehend the ultimate rules, which might also be a benefit of the Ultimate Tribulation!

"The ultimate rule of the Demon Hell has broken through to the two hundred realm!"

Ye Tian's strength now is much stronger than in the past.

Moreover, his Demon Hell Ultimate Body had also been raised to the limit of Dacheng, and if he wanted to raise the Demon Hell Ultimate Body to the consummation realm, he didn't need to cultivate the Demon Hell Ultimate Rule to three hundred and sixty-five levels.

2.1 Probably raise the ultimate rules of the Hell a little more, and then collect enough resources, you can raise the ultimate body of the Hell to the perfection realm.

When the time comes, he will be able to advance to the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord Realm.

In other words, he was now only one step away from the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord Realm.

During this time, he was very low-key, and he had been impacting the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, striving to break through as soon as possible.

In this way, hundreds of thousands of ultimate epochs have passed.

this day.

With the help of the Ultimate Golden Chaos Leaf of the Doomsday Extremity, Ye Tian once again created an ultimate arcane art—Flashstep!

This is the ultimate arcane in terms of speed, and after this ultimate arcane is created, there are definitely only a handful of ancient level ultimate realm masters who can catch up.
